character.bio: An up-and-coming jewelry designer from Italy who claims ancestry to ancient Greek warriors. As a child, she was inspired by a vision of the Colosseum in its prime. Today, she seeks glory with a smile—and an eye for beauty.

marisa_standing_medium_punch_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

marisa_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change its properties

marisa_standing_heavy_punch_charged.note: Forces a juggle state knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent15 frames of advantage added when the attack lands as a Punish Counter.1 frames of recovery subtracted on hit or when blocked

marisa_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Hold the button for more than 14 frames to change its propertiesForces a juggle state knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponentForces a juggle state knockdown when the attack lands for a Punish Counter

marisa_standing_heavy_kick_charged.note: Increase juggle state time when attack lands as a Punish Counter

marisa_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Hold the button for more than 17 frames to change its properties

marisa_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Hold the button for more than 16 frames to change its propertiesKnockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

marisa_crouching_heavy_kick_charged.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown3 frames of recovery subtracted on hit or when blocked

marisa_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

marisa_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Hold the button for more than 20 frames to change its propertiesProduces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

marisa_jumping_heavy_kick.note: Hold down the button for over 20 frames to change its properties

marisa_caelum_arc.note: Hold down the button for over 20 frames to change its propertiesProduces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponentHas cross-up attack properties

marisa_magna_bunker_h.note: Hold down the button for over 17 frames to change its properties3 frames of recovery added if the attack misses

marisa_magna_bunker_charged.note: 6 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

marisa_novacula_thrust.note: Can be canceled into a Super ArtDoes not hit crouching opponents

marisa_malleus_breaker_1_h.note: Hold down the button for over 14 frames to change its propertiesProduces a ground bound when hitting a mid-air opponent

marisa_malleus_breaker_1_charged.note: Produces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

marisa_falx_crusher_1_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionHold the button for more than 21 frames to change its properties

marisa_falx_crusher_1_charged.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

marisa_od_gladius.note: Hold down the button for over 29 frames to change its propertiesUpper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 22Has armor break properties

marisa_od_gladius_charged.note: Upper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 38Has armor break properties

marisa_l_dimachaerus_1_l.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 15Can transition to branching attacks from frames 22 - 32

marisa_m_dimachaerus_1_m.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionCan transition to branching attacks from frames 27 - 36

marisa_h_dimachaerus_1_h.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 35 - 42

marisa_od_dimachaerus_1.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 19Can transition to branching attacks from frames 31 - 39Has armor break properties

marisa_l_phalanx_l.note: Upper body has Super Armor from frames 7 - 11Invincible to projectiles from frames 12 - 27Considered airborne from frames 11 - 29

marisa_scutum.note: Upper body has Super Armor for 1 hit from frames 3 - 28Automatically transitions into a special attack when the Super Armor absorbs the opponent's attackCan transition to branching attacks from frames 9 - 14Hold down the button to extend the technique

marisa_scutum_physical_counter_version.note: Always in Punish Counter state during executionScutum stance continues while the button is heldHas armor break properties

marisa_od_scutum.note: Upper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 28Automatically transitions into a special attack when the Super Armor absorbs the opponent's attackCan transition to branching attacks from frames 9 - 14Hold down the button to extend the technique

marisa_od_scutum_physical_counter_versio.note: Always in Punish Counter state during executionScutum stance continues while the button is heldHas armor break properties

marisa_tonitrus_1.note: Always in Punish Counter state during execution2 frames of recovery added on armor hit or if the attack missesCan transition to branching attacks on hit or block

marisa_tonitrus_2.note: Always in Punish Counter state during execution

marisa_procella.note: Always in Punish Counter state during execution

marisa_enfold.note: Always in Punish Counter state during executionWith Classic ControlsDoes 2875 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 2300 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

marisa_sa1_javelin_of_marisa.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
marisa_sa1_javelin_of_marisa.note: Hold down the button for over 27 frames to change its propertiesSuper Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 23Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

marisa_sa1_javelin_of_marisa_charged.note: Transitions to attack when hit by an opponent's attack or throw between frames 1 - 27Upper body has Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 28 - 47Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterProperties change to the following if the attack lands on frames 46 - 47- Damage is 2600- Does not go into full cinematic animation

marisa_sa1_javelin_of_marisa_physical_co.displayName: SA1 Javelin of Marisa(Physical counter version)

marisa_sa2_meteorite.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 16Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Considered airborne from frames 16 - 48Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterProperties change to the following if the attack lands between frames 49 - 51- Damage is 2500- Does not go into full cinematic animation

marisa_sa3_goddess_of_the_hunt.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
marisa_sa3_goddess_of_the_hunt.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
marisa_sa3_goddess_of_the_hunt.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 19Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%

marisa_ca_goddess_of_the_hunt.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
marisa_ca_goddess_of_the_hunt.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K

marisa_mounted_grace.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

marisa_drive_impact_secutor.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following on Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

marisa_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
marisa_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
marisa_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

marisa_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

marisa_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
marisa_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
marisa_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

marisa_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

marisa_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

marisa_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

marisa_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
marisa_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
marisa_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
